markdowns.body:
| Left align | Right align | Center align |
|:-----------|------------:|:------------:|
| This       | This        | This         |

markdowns.name: Details
markdowns.body:
<details open>
<summary>Sample</summary>
If you want to close the default, remove "open"
</details>

diagrams.name: Sequence
Flowchart
diagrams.body:
---
title: Node with text
---
flowchart LR
    id1[This is the text in the box]

diagrams.name: Class
diagrams.body:
---
title: Bank example
---
classDiagram
    class BankAccount
    BankAccount : +String owner
    BankAccount : +Bigdecimal balance
    BankAccount : +deposit(amount)
    BankAccount : +withdrawal(amount)

diagrams.name: State
diagrams.body:
---
title: Simple sample
---
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> [*]

    Still --> Moving
    Moving --> Still
    Moving --> Crash
    Crash --> [*]

diagrams.name: ER
diagrams.body:
---
title: Order example
---
erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
    CUSTOMER }|..|{ DELIVERY-ADDRESS : uses

diagrams.name: Gantt
diagrams.body:
gantt
    title A Gantt Diagram
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Section
        A task          :a1, 2014-01-01, 30d
        Another task    :after a1, 20d
    section Another
        Task in Another :2014-01-12, 12d
        another task    :24d

diagrams.name: Pie
diagrams.body:
pie title Pets adopted by volunteers
    "Dogs" : 386
    "Cats" : 85
    "Rats" : 15
